headline: Close the Gap: Move Hard, Eat Clean Today
summary: You're 0.1 kg/week behind pace — Thursday discipline is your best weapon before the weekend challenge begins.
details: Eat whole foods today, target under 1,800 calories, and cut out snacks entirely — prep tomorrow's food now so Friday temptation has no opening. Hit 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill today; rowing burns more per session and counters your sedentary desk work directly. You're 49 days behind schedule at 122.3 kg — every clean Thursday locks in momentum before your historically harder Friday–Sunday stretch.
